title: Sif'kric
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Sif'kric |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square M-7 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Mezeg sector/Legends|Mezeg sector]] |system=[[Sif'kric system/Legends|Sif'kric system]] |coordinates=M-7 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Sif'krie]]''[[Specter of the Past]]'' |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] }} {{Quote|All ships, this is General Bel Iblis. We've just been informed that a strong Frezhlix force is moving on the Sif'krie homeworld of Sif'kric.|[[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]|}} '''Sif'kric''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mezeg sector/Legends|Mezeg sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. This planet was attacked during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]]. ==Description== {{Quote|Corran, what are these pommwomm plants you mentioned?''"
"''They're a type of hot-world shrub that grows on the system's inner planet. You can get about eight different exotic medicines and twice that number of food flavorings out of them.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|}} Sif'kric was home to the [[Sif'krie]]s, a people who were constantly feuding with the [[Frezh]]lix who shared the [[Sif'kric system/Legends|Sif'kric system]] with them. Sif'kric was one of the outer worlds in the [[Sif'kric system/Legends|Sif'kric system]]. An inner [[Pommwomm homeworld|world]] was a hot-world where [[pommwomm]] plants were grown and exported to Sif'kric annually. These plants were the basis of the Sif'kric economy. ==History== {{Quote|Ten to one it's the Frezhlix; they've been feuding with the Sif'kries ever since we chased the Empire out of the area.|Corran Horn|}} During the [[Caamas Document Crisis]], in [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], the Frezhlix [[Blockade of Sif'kric|blockaded]] the planet Sif'kric. The Frezhlix justification was the Sif'krie's opposition to the [[Drashtine Initiative]] in their [[sector assembly]], demanding that the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]] pay reparations for the [[Caamas Firestorm|destruction]] of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]]. Up to 20% of their yearly pommwomm production was at risk of being wiped out, but the blockade was broken by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces under [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} *''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Galactic Empire planets]] [[Category:Mezeg sector locations]] [[Category:New Republic planets]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the New Territories]]
